prompt: A photorealistic, wide-angle cinematic photograph of the extensive, gnarled vineyard landscape derived from image_1.png and image_2.png. The scene retains the extensive rows of tortured, ancient, gnarled vine trunks in the foreground and stretching into the distance. Each of these trunks has been tortured, fractured, and manually re-assembled with intricate surgical wires and prominent industrial-strength metal staples to create a flawless, uniform Fibonacci spiral shape. The prominent foreground spiral is visibly fractured, bleeding thick, dark amber sap and resin in a visceral, material agony, matching the detail in image_2.png. All the intricate wires and staples from image_2.png are present and clear. The ground is cracked and arid. The lonely, healthy, fully-canopied olive tree from image_2.png remains in the mid-distance near the stone wall on the right. The upper right sky is a natural, tumultuous, stormy cloudscape, matching the rest of the atmospheric sky and completely devoid of any grid overlays, floating lines, geometric grids, or chart-like elements. The lighting is moody and dramatic, emphasizing textures. The viewpoint is elevated to capture the vast scale of the compliant landscape. The composition is silent, uncanny, and haunting. There is no text, number, signature, or grid of any kind in the sky or within the image. The image is clean and photorealistic.
visual_logic: An entire orchard is warped and splintered, held together by wires to force every tree into a uniform, perfect geometric spiral. The result achieves mathematical perfection (the target) but destroys the orchard's life and function.
